name: forecast_bundle_locker_v1_scheduler_guard_hotfix
purpose: Prevent scheduled forecast-bundle locker runs from committing placeholder bundles when no real event/gate forecast source rows exist.

scheduled_guard.no_source_behavior: write _runtime guard report, exit 0, create no latest/history bundles, commit no changes

manual_runs.reason: Manual gate locking is a deliberate operator action and remains useful for controlled validation setup.

promotion_gate: unchanged; promotion remains blocked until scored blind/session-gated performance satisfies criteria
